hausa.iron_oxide_rust_gives_mars_its_red_col: Ƙarfe oxide (tsatsa) ne ke ba Mars jan launin ta.
hausa.saturn_s_density_is_less_than_water_0_: Yawan Saturn ya fi na ruwa ƙaranci (0.687 g/cm³)!

hausa.earth_s_magnetic_field_deflects_charge: Filin maganadisu na Duniya yana kore ɓangarorin rana masu caji. Ozone yana taimakawa da UV, amma filin maganadisu shi ne babbar garkuwa!
hausa.the_iau_s_2006_definition_requires_pla: Ma'anar IAU ta 2006 tana buƙatar duniyoyi su share unguwar kewayarsu daga sauran tarkace.
hausa.also_called_the_goldilocks_zone_not_to: Ana kuma kiransa 'yankin Goldilocks' — ba mai zafi sosai ba, ba mai sanyi sosai ba don ruwa mai ruwa a saman.
hausa.the_moon_rotates_exactly_once_per_orbi: Wata yana juyawa sau ɗaya daidai kowace kewaya — ƙarfin hawan ruwa ne ya haifar da wannan daidaituwa cikin biliyoyin shekaru.
hausa.opportunity_rover_found_hematite_blueb: Rover Opportunity ya sami 'blueberries' na hematite — ma'adanai da ke samuwa cikin ruwa kaɗai. Hotunan kewaya na nuna tsofaffin bakin koguna!
hausa.venus_is_hotter_462_c_vs_430_c_mercury: Venus ta fi zafi (462°C da 430°C)! Mercury ba ta da sararin iska da zai riƙe zafi. Tasirin gida-gilashi ya fi nisa muhimmanci.
hausa.gas_giants_have_no_solid_surface_they_: Manyan duniyoyin gas ba su da saman mai ƙarfi! Galibi iskar hydrogen da helium ce da ke ƙara kauri a hankali zuwa tsakiya. Na'urar bincike za ta ci gaba da nutsewa ba tare da ƙarewa ba.
hausa.earth_s_distance_from_the_sun_doesn_t_: Nisan Duniya daga Rana ba ya canzawa cikin rana ɗaya. Tsakar rana kawai na nufin Rana ta fi tsawo a sararin ka. Duniya ta fi kusa a watan Janairu (perihelion)!
hausa.jupiter_is_11x_wider_than_earth_and_1_: Jupiter ya fi Duniya faɗi sau 11, kuma Duniyoyi 1,300 za su iya shiga cikinsa! Tsarin rana yana da bambancin girma mai tsanani.
hausa.pluto_is_still_in_the_solar_system_it_: Pluto na nan cikin tsarin rana! An sauya masa matsayi daga 'duniya' zuwa 'ƙaramar duniya' a 2006, amma har yanzu yana kewaya Rana.
hausa.the_asteroid_belt_is_mostly_empty_spac: Bel ɗin asteroid galibi fanko ne! Matsakaicin nisa tsakanin asteroid ɗin miliyoyin kilomita ne. Jiragen sama na ratsawa ba tare da wani haɗari ba.
hausa.not_always_saturn_is_95x_earth_s_mass_: Ba kullum ba! Nauyin Saturn sau 95 ne na Duniya amma ƙarfin jawo a saman 1.06g ne kawai saboda tana da girma kuma yawanta ƙarami. Nauyi ya dogara da yawa DA radius.
hausa.all_parts_of_the_moon_receive_sunlight: Duk sassan Wata suna samun hasken rana! 'Gefen nesa' shi ne rabin da ba mu iya gani daga Duniya saboda manne da hawan ruwa. Yana samun rana daidai gwargwado.
hausa.the_habitable_zone_or_goldilocks_zone_: Yankin da ake iya zama (ko 'yankin Goldilocks') shi ne kewayon nisa daga tauraro inda ruwa mai ruwa zai iya kasancewa a saman duniya. A tsarin ranarmu, Venus tana gefen ciki, Duniya tana tsakiya, Mars kuma tana gefen waje. Amma samun ruwa mai ruwa yana kuma buƙatar sararin iska da filin maganadisu masu kyau!
hausa.when_sunlight_heats_a_planet_s_surface: Sa'ad da hasken rana ya ɗumama saman duniya, saman yana sake fitar da zafi (infrared). Iskar gas ɗin gida-gilashi (CO₂, CH₄, H₂O) tana shan wannan zafi kuma ta sake fitar da shi, tana ɗumama duniyar. Gida-gilashin Duniya +33°C ne (yana kiyaye rayuwa). Na Venus +510°C ne (mara sarrafuwa). Mars kusan ba ta da shi (matsakaici -60°C). Yawan iskar gas ɗin gida-gilashi ne ke tantance sakamakon!
hausa.a_planet_s_magnetic_field_creates_a_ma: Filin maganadisu na duniya yana samar da 'magnetosphere' — garkuwar da ba a gani da ke kore iskar rana (ɓangarori masu caji daga Rana). Filin maganadisu na Duniya yana kare sararin iskarmu kuma ya sa rayuwa ta yiwu. Mars ta rasa filin maganadisu shekaru biliyan 4 da suka wuce, sannan a hankali aka tuɓe sararin iskar ta. Filin maganadisu na Jupiter ya fi na Duniya ƙarfi sau 20,000!
hausa.why_isn_t_pluto_a_planet: Me Ya Sa Pluto Ba Duniya Ba Ce?
hausa.in_2006_the_international_astronomical: A 2006, Ƙungiyar Taurari ta Duniya (IAU) ta bayyana sharuɗɗa uku na duniya: (1) Tana kewaya Rana ✓, (2) Tana da nauyin da ya isa ta zama zagaye ✓, (3) Ta 'share kewayarta' daga sauran tarkace ✗. Pluto tana raba yankin kewayarta da dubban abubuwan Bel ɗin Kuiper, don haka aka sanya ta 'ƙaramar duniya.' Wannan bai rage sha'awarta ba — New Horizons ya nuna tana da aiki a fannin ƙasa!
hausa.over_billions_of_years_gravitational_t: Cikin biliyoyin shekaru, ƙarfin hawan ruwa na iya rage juyawar wata har ya daidaita da tsawon kewayarsa. Sakamakon: fuska ɗaya kullum tana fuskantar duniyar. Watanmu ya manne da Duniya. Mercury ya manne wani ɓangare da Rana (rabo 3:2). Pluto da Charon sun manne da juna — kullum suna nuna fuska ɗaya ga juna!
hausa.a_biosignature_is_any_evidence_of_past: Alamar rayuwa (biosignature) duk wata shaida ce ta rayuwa ta baya ko ta yanzu. Masana kimiyya suna neman: (1) ruwa mai ruwa, (2) ƙwayoyin organic, (3) iskar gas na sararin samaniya kamar oxygen ko methan da ba za su kasance ba idan babu rayuwa da ke samar da su, (4) tushen makamashi. Wurare mafi kyau a tsarin ranarmu: Mars (tsohon ruwa), Europa (tekun ƙarƙashin ƙasa), Enceladus (marmaron ruwa), da Titan (tabkunan methan).

hausa.constellations_are_patterns_of_stars_t: Ƙungiyoyin taurari tsari ne na taurari da al'adu suka gane cikin dubban shekaru. IAU ta tsara ƙungiyoyin taurari 88 na hukuma a 1922. Taurarin da ke cikin ƙungiya galibi ba su kusa da juna a zahiri — kawai suna bayyana kusa daga Duniya.
hausa.how_much_delta_v_travel_time_to_reach_: Delta-v nawa + lokacin tafiya nawa ake buƙata don kaiwa wurare daban-daban? An nuna kewayoyin canjin Hohmann.
hausa.a_hohmann_transfer_is_the_most_fuel_ef_2: Canjin Hohmann shi ne hanya mafi tanadin man fetur don motsi tsakanin kewayoyin da'ira biyu. Yana amfani da ƙonewa biyu: ɗaya don shiga siffar ƙwai ta canji, ɗaya don yin da'ira a inda za a je. Δv shi ne jimlar canjin saurin da ake buƙata.
hausa.mars_rover_pathfinder: 🚗 Mai Nemo Hanyar Rover na Mars
hausa.pilot_a_rover_from_start_to_goal_plan_: Tuƙi rover daga farko zuwa manufa. Tsara kewaye da duwatsu da tsaunuka; kula da man fetur!
hausa.drive_the_rover_from_start_to_goal_cos: Tuƙi rover daga farko zuwa manufa. Farashi: ƙasa mai lebur 1,
hausa.plan_the_path_to_conserve_fuel_like_re: Tsara hanyar don adana man fetur. Kamar ainihin rover na Mars, kowace mita tana buƙatar kasafin man fetur.
hausa.how_astronomers_measure_distance_each_: Yadda masana taurari ke auna nisa: kowace hanya tana ba da tushe ga na gaba. Hau daga girman Duniya zuwa sararin samaniyar da ake iya gani.
hausa.compared_sun_angle_in_two_cities_first: Ya kwatanta kusurwar rana a birane biyu. Aunawa ta farko ta Duniya.
hausa.hipparchus_150_bce_used_earth_s_shadow: Hipparchus (~150 KHM) ya yi amfani da inuwar Duniya a Wata lokacin kusufi don kiyasta nisa.
hausa.defines_the_astronomical_unit_modern_r: Yana bayyana ma'aunin taurari. Amsar radar na zamani daidai ne har zuwa mita.
hausa.kepler_s_third_law_distance_from_orbit: Doka ta uku ta Kepler: nisa daga tsawon lokacin kewaya. Yanzu jiragen sama sun tabbatar.
hausa.earth_s_orbit_gives_2_au_baseline_star: Kewayar Duniya tana ba da tushen 2 AU. Tauraro yana bayyana yana motsi bisa yanayi.
hausa.pulsation_period_reveals_true_brightne: Tsawon lokacin bugawa yana bayyana ainihin haske. Kwatanta da hasken da ake gani don samun nisa.
hausa.same_cepheid_method_extended_to_other_: Hanyar Cepheid guda ɗaya da aka faɗaɗa zuwa sauran galaxy. Hubble ya nuna Andromeda tana wajen galaxy ɗinmu a 1923.
hausa.more_distant_galaxies_are_receding_fas: Galaxy masu nisa suna ja da baya da sauri. v = H × d yana ba da nisa.
hausa.edge_of_observable_universe: Gefen sararin samaniyar da ake iya gani
hausa.cosmic_microwave_background_is_light_f: Bayan Fage na Microwave na Sararin Samaniya haske ne daga shekaru biliyan 13.8 da suka wuce, wanda faɗaɗawa ta miƙe.
hausa.light_from_receding_objects_redshifts_: Haske daga abubuwan da ke ja da baya yana zuwa ja; daga masu kusantowa, yana zuwa shuɗi. Haka muke auna nisan sararin samaniya + sanin sararin samaniya na faɗaɗawa.
hausa.how_much_of_a_planet_s_incoming_sunlig: Nawa daga hasken ranar da ke shigowa duniya ake nunawa da nawa ake sha? Wannan ne ke tuƙa yanayin zafi na duniya.
hausa.albedo_fraction_of_light_reflected_ice: Albedo = kaso na hasken da aka nuna. Ƙanƙara + gajimare suna nunawa sosai (albedo sama); ƙasa mai duhu + ruwa suna sha (albedo ƙasa). Ƙarin nunawa = duniya mai sanyi. Wannan shi ne martanin ƙanƙara-albedo da ke tuƙa zamanin ƙanƙara.
hausa.13_8_billion_years_compressed_into_a_s: Shekaru biliyan 13.8 an matsa su cikin sila ɗaya. Zaga daga wurin farko zuwa yau.
hausa.spacetime_matter_compressed_to_a_point: An matsa sarari-lokaci + abu zuwa wuri ɗaya
hausa.universe_expands_by_10_in_a_fraction_o: Sararin samaniya ya faɗaɗa da 10²⁶ cikin ɗan ƙaramin lokaci
hausa.quarks_bind_into_protons_and_neutrons: Quark suna haɗuwa zuwa proton da neutron
hausa.first_atomic_nuclei_hydrogen_helium_li: Tsakiyar atom na farko: hydrogen, helium, lithium
hausa.first_atoms_cmb_photons_released: Atom na farko; an saki photon na CMB
hausa.no_stars_mostly_neutral_hydrogen_dark_: Babu taurari; galibi hydrogen mai tsaka-tsaki + baƙin abu
hausa.population_iii_stars_massive_short_liv: Taurarin Ƙarni na III: masu nauyi, gajeren rai
hausa.mergers_create_the_first_galaxy_seeds: Haɗuwa suna samar da tsaba na galaxy na farko
hausa.most_galaxies_assembled_star_formation: An haɗa yawancin galaxy; samuwar taurari ta kai kololuwa
hausa.expansion_accelerating_due_to_dark_ene: Faɗaɗawa na hanzarta saboda baƙin makamashi
hausa.the_universe_is_13_8_billion_years_old: Sararin samaniya yana da shekaru biliyan 13.8. Ya fara da kauri da zafi marar iyaka, sannan ya faɗaɗa ya yi sanyi. Galaxy sun samu a shekara biliyan 1, Ranarmu a biliyan 9, mu kuma muna nan a biliyan 13.8.
hausa.click_incoming_asteroids_before_they_r: Danna asteroid masu zuwa kafin su kai Duniya. Kamar kariyar duniyoyi na aikin DART na NASA.
hausa.real_nasa_program_dart_double_asteroid: Ainihin shirin NASA: DART (Double Asteroid Redirection Test) ya yi nasarar canza kewayar Dimorphos a 2022. Ofishin Haɗin Kan Kare Duniyoyi yana bin diddigin abubuwa 30,000+ da ke kusa da Duniya.
hausa.four_galaxy_morphologies_spirals_like_: Siffofin galaxy huɗu. Masu karkacewa kamar namu suna nuna hannaye da ke bin samuwar taurari. Masu siffar ƙwai tsofaffi ne, marasa tsari kuma rikice-rikice ne.
hausa.bigger_aperture_gathers_more_light_res: Babban buɗi yana tara ƙarin haske + yana bayyana ƙarin bayani. Girmamawa ba ta da muhimmanci kamar yadda kake tsammani.
hausa.aperture_matters_more_than_magnificati: Buɗi ya fi girmamawa muhimmanci! Babban madubi yana tara ƙarin haske + yana bayyana ƙarin bayani. Girmamawa fiye da kusan 20x kowace cm na buɗi kawai tana ɓata gani. Madubin JWST na mita 6.5 yana nazarin galaxy daga ƴan ɗaruruwan miliyoyin shekaru na farko bayan Babban Fashewa.
hausa.drag_the_altitude_slider_up_through_ea: Ja silar tsawo sama ta cikin sararin iskar Duniya. Matsi yana sauka, zafi yana canzawa, sunadarai kuma suna canzawa layi bayan layi.
hausa.weather_happens_here_temperature_decre: Yanayi yana faruwa a nan. Zafi yana raguwa da tsawo.
hausa.ozone_layer_absorbs_uv_temperature_inc: Layin ozone yana shan UV. Zafi yana ƙaruwa da tsawo.
hausa.meteors_burn_up_here_coldest_layer_90_: Duwatsun sararin samaniya suna ƙonewa a nan. Layi mafi sanyi (-90°C).
hausa.iss_orbits_here_400km_aurora_glow_very: ISS na kewayawa a nan (400km). Haskoki suna haskakawa. Iska siriri sosai amma mai zafi.
hausa.boundary_to_space_air_escapes_to_space: Iyaka zuwa sararin samaniya. Iska tana tserewa zuwa sararin samaniya.
hausa.galileo_s_1610_observations_venus_goes: Abin da Galileo ya lura a 1610: Venus tana bi ta matakai. Wannan ya tabbatar Venus tana kewaya Rana, ba Duniya ba.
hausa.galileo_s_1610_discovery_venus_has_pha: Binciken Galileo na 1610: Venus tana da matakai kamar Wata
hausa.in_1610_galileo_observed_venus_through: A 1610 Galileo ya kalli Venus ta telescope ɗinsa ya ga tana bi ta matakai — kamar Wata. Wannan shaida ce cewa Venus tana kewaya Rana, ba Duniya ba. Tsarin Ptolemy na tsakiya-duniya ba zai iya bayyana cikakkiyar Venus ba. Babbar shaida ga tsarin Copernicus na tsakiya-rana.
hausa.a_magnetic_field_deflects_solar_wind_p: Filin maganadisu yana kore iskar rana + yana kare sararin iska. Mars ta rasa duka biyun; shi ya sa take fanko.
hausa.earth_s_magnetic_field_deflects_most_s: Filin maganadisu na Duniya yana kore yawancin iskar rana, yana kare sararin iska + rayuwa. Mars ta rasa filin maganadisu shekaru biliyan ~4 da suka wuce sannan a hankali ta rasa sararin iskarta. Jupiter yana da filin mafi ƙarfi a tsarin rana.
hausa.switch_between_size_and_distance_views: Sauya tsakanin kallon girma da na nisa. Ba za a iya nuna duka biyun a ma'aunin gaskiya lokaci ɗaya ba — haka sararin samaniya yake fanko.
hausa.true_scales_are_hard_to_show_simultane: Yana da wuya a nuna ainihin ma'auni lokaci ɗaya. Da Duniya waken suya ce, Rana za ta zama ƙwallon rairayin bakin teku mai nisan ƙafa 200. Idan nisa suna a ma'auni, duniyoyi sun zama ɗigogin da ba a gani. Yawancin zane suna sasantawa.
hausa.thrust_to_slow_your_descent_land_softe: Tura don rage saukowarka. Sauka a hankali fiye da 2.5 m/s ko ka faɗi. Sarrafa man fetur — bai isa ka yi ta rataye ba.
hausa.apollo_11_nearly_ran_out_of_fuel_durin: Apollo 11 ya kusa ƙarewa da man fetur lokacin saukowa a Wata. Neil Armstrong ya kashe na'urar tuƙi ta atomatik da hannu don neman wuri mafi kyau na saukowa. Saukowar ta faru da sauran man fetur na ~dakika 25.
hausa.pick_a_destination_see_how_long_light_: Zaɓi inda za ka je + ka ga tsawon lokacin da haske ke ɗauka don kaiwa. Bayan tsarin rana, nisa yana zama mai ban tsoro.
hausa.edge_of_observable_universe_2: Gefen sararin samaniyar da ake iya gani
hausa.light_moves_300_000_km_s_we_see_distan: Haske yana tafiya 300,000 km/s. Muna ganin abubuwa masu nisa kamar yadda suke lokacin da haske ya bar su. Ranar da muke gani tana da minti 8; Proxima Centauri tana da shekaru 4. Galaxy Andromeda tana da shekaru miliyan 2.5.
hausa.where_exactly_does_the_sun_rise_set_it: A ina daidai Rana take fitowa + faɗuwa? Ya dogara da latitud ɗinka + ranar. Gwada Maine da Da'irar Arctic.
hausa.sun_path_depends_on_latitude_season_at: Hanyar rana ta dogara da latitud + yanayi. A equator, rana tana wucewa kai tsaye sama. A Da'irar Arctic, rana ta tsakar dare a solstice na bazara + dare na sanda a solstice na hunturu. Portland ta Maine: ranar tsakiyar bazara tana sama; tsakiyar hunturu kuma, rana da ƙyar take ƙetare sararin sama.
hausa.some_moons_may_host_life_europa_encela: Wasu watanni na iya ɗaukar rayuwa: Europa + Enceladus + Titan + Ganymede suna da tekuna ƙarƙashin ƙasa. Ayyuka masu gudana suna nema yanzu.
hausa.subsurface_ocean_has_2_water_of_earth_: Tekun ƙarƙashin ƙasa yana da ruwa sau 2× na tekunan Duniya. Marmaron zafi na iya kasancewa a ƙasan teku. Ayyukan JUICE + Europa Clipper suna gudana.
hausa.cassini_discovered_geysers_spraying_wa: Cassini ya gano marmaro na fesa ruwa + abubuwan organic + hydrogen + silica. Sunadaran turɓayar suna nuna abubuwa + tushen makamashi da za su iya tallafa wa rayuwa.
hausa.thick_atmosphere_of_n2_ch4_lakes_of_li: Sararin iska mai kauri na N2 + CH4. Tabkunan methan mai ruwa a saman. Tekun ruwa-ammoniya a ƙasa. Rayuwa mai yiwuwa amma ta bambanta sosai.
hausa.largest_moon_subsurface_ocean_confirme: Wata mafi girma. Hubble ya samu shaida mai ƙarfi ta tekun ƙarƙashin ƙasa. Aikin JUICE zai yi nazarinsa.
hausa.oldest_visible_surface_in_solar_system: Saman mafi tsufa da ake gani a tsarin rana. Mai yiwuwa akwai teku ƙarƙashin ƙasa. Ƙarancin radiation fiye da sauran watannin Jupiter.
hausa.most_volcanically_active_body_in_solar: Jikin da ya fi kowane aman wuta a tsarin rana. Aman wuta 400+ masu aiki. Sararin iska na sulfur dioxide. Ba a iya zama.
hausa.what_would_it_take_to_make_mars_liveab: Me ake buƙata don sa Mars ta zama mazaunin rayuwa? Daidaita iskar gas ɗin gida-gilashi, narkewar ƙanƙara, da rufin tsirrai — kalli Mars tana sauyawa.
hausa.terraforming_mars_would_take_thousands: Sauya Mars zai ɗauki dubban shekaru. Ana buƙatar: kauri sararin iska (iskar gas ɗin gida-gilashi), ɗumama saman (yana narkar da ƙanƙara), shigar da tsirrai (oxygen). Nazarin NASA na nuna ajiyar CO2 ta Mars ta yanzu ta yi siriri sosai don sauyawa ba tare da shigo da abubuwa da yawa ba. Har yanzu galibi almara ce ta kimiyya.
hausa.hubble_stared_at_an_empty_patch_of_sky: Hubble ya dubi wani wuri fanko na sararin sama kwana 10 ya sami galaxy 3000 masu nisa. Duba sosai + kowane ɗigo mai duhu galaxy ne.
hausa.each_fuzzy_blob_is_a_galaxy_of_100_bil: Kowane ɗigo mai duhu galaxy ne na miliyoyin zuwa ɗaruruwan biliyoyin taurari
hausa.in_1995_hubble_pointed_at_a_tiny_dark_: A 1995, Hubble ya nuna wa wani ƙaramin wuri mai duhu na sararin sama kwana 10. Sakamako: galaxy 3000 masu nisa a hoto ɗaya. JWST ya kai wannan zurfi, yana nazarin galaxy daga ƴan ɗaruruwan miliyoyin shekaru na farko bayan Babban Fashewa.
hausa.hotter_stars_look_bluer_cooler_stars_r: Taurari masu zafi suna kama da shuɗi; masu sanyi kuma ja. Ana rarraba taurari OBAFGKM bisa nau'in spectrum.
hausa.red_dwarf_coolest_most_common_stars_75: Jan tauraro ƙarami — taurari mafi sanyi + mafi yawa (kashi 75% na dukkan taurari)
hausa.orange_dwarf_quieter_than_sun_longer_l: Tauraro ƙarami mai launin lemu — mai natsuwa fiye da Rana, mai tsawon rai
hausa.blue_hottest_rarest_stars_lifespans_on: Shuɗi — taurari mafi zafi + mafi wuya, tsawon rai miliyoyin shekaru kawai
hausa.star_color_temperature_astronomy_mnemo: Launin tauraro = zafi. Tunatarwar masana taurari ga jerin spectrum na OBAFGKM (mafi zafi zuwa mafi sanyi): 'Oh Be A Fine Girl/Guy, Kiss Me.' Taurari masu zafi sun fi girma + haske + gajeren rai.
hausa.tidal_locking_simulator: 🔒 Na'urar Kwaikwayon Manne da Hawan Ruwa
hausa.why_does_the_moon_always_show_the_same: Me ya sa Wata kullum yake nuna fuska ɗaya? Ƙarfin hawan ruwa ya rage juyawarsa. Duba yadda nisa + nauyi ke shafar lokacin manne.
hausa.tidal_forces_gradually_slow_a_moon_s_r: Ƙarfin hawan ruwa a hankali yana rage juyawar wata har ya daidaita da tsawon kewayarsa. Watanmu ya manne ta hawan ruwa: fuska ɗaya kullum tana fuskantar Duniya. Mercury tana cikin daidaituwar 3:2 da Rana (ba ta manne sosai ba).
hausa.click_each_crater_real_planetary_scien: Danna kowane rami. Ainihin masana kimiyyar duniyoyi suna ƙidayar ramuka don sanin shekarun saman — ƙarin ramuka = tsufa.
hausa.crater_counting_is_how_scientists_dete: Ƙidayar ramuka ita ce hanyar da masana kimiyya ke tantance shekarun saman duniyoyi. Ƙarin ramuka = saman mai tsufa. Tuddan Wata suna da ramuka da yawa (tsofaffi sosai); maria kuma sabbin kwararar lava ne.
hausa.mass_curves_spacetime_drag_mass_watch_: Nauyi yana lanƙwasa sarari-lokaci. Ja nauyi + kalli rijiyar tana zurfafa. Mirgina ƙwallon don ganin yadda take faɗuwa ciki.
hausa.einstein_s_general_relativity_says_mas: Ka'idar Einstein ta gama-gari ta ce nauyi yana lanƙwasa sarari-lokaci. Abubuwa ba sa jin wani ƙarfi — suna bin hanyoyi mafi gajarta ta cikin lanƙwasasshiyar siffar. Wannan shi ne ƙarfin jawo. Baƙaƙen ramuka suna lanƙwasa sarari-lokaci sosai har ko haske ba ya tserewa.
hausa.three_main_asteroid_types_c_s_m_mining: Manyan nau'ikan asteroid uku: C, S, M. Kamfanonin haƙar ma'adanai suna sha'awar nau'in M don ƙarfe + platinum.
hausa.most_common_75_dark_primitive_water_ri: Mafi yawa (kashi 75%). Mai duhu, na farko, mai yawan ruwa. Ana samun su a bel ɗin waje.
hausa.stony_17_lighter_made_of_silicate_mine: Mai dutse (kashi 17%). Mai sauƙi, an yi shi da ma'adanan silicate + ƙarfe. Ana samun su a bel ɗin ciki.
hausa.metal_rich_8_mostly_iron_nickel_possib: Mai yawan ƙarfe (kashi 8%). Galibi ƙarfe + nickel. Mai yiwuwa daga tsakiyar duniyoyin farko da suka rushe. Manufar haƙar ma'adanai.
hausa.cosmic_microwave_background: 📡 Bayan Fage na Microwave na Sararin Samaniya
hausa.light_from_380_000_years_after_the_big: Haske daga shekaru 380,000 bayan Babban Fashewa. Ƙananan bambance-bambance su ne tsaba na kowace galaxy.
hausa.cosmic_microwave_background_simulated: Bayan Fage na Microwave na Sararin Samaniya (kwaikwayo)
hausa.temperature_fluctuations_of_0_0001_see: Sauyin zafi na kusan kashi 0.001% — tsaba na dukkan tsari
hausa.the_cmb_is_leftover_light_from_380_000: CMB shi ne sauran hasken daga shekaru 380,000 bayan Babban Fashewa. Ƙananan bambancin zafi suna nuna inda abu ya ɗan yi kauri. Waɗannan wuraren masu kauri sun girma zuwa dukkan galaxy + taurarin da muke gani yau. Penzias + Wilson sun gano su ba da gangan ba a 1965 (kyautar Nobel 1978).
hausa.saturn_s_rings_are_99_water_ice_in_tri: Zobban Saturn kashi 99% ƙanƙarar ruwa ne cikin tiriliyoyin guntuwa. Suna iya kasancewa shekaru miliyan 100 kawai.
hausa.saturn_s_rings_are_mostly_water_ice_pa: Zobban Saturn galibi ɓangarorin ƙanƙarar ruwa ne masu girman ƙurar yashi zuwa gunduwoyi girman gida. Sun miƙe kilomita 282,000 amma kaurinsu < kilomita 1. Mai yiwuwa sun samu daga wata da ya rushe shekaru miliyan ~100 da suka wuce — sabbi ne!
hausa.pick_a_core_surface_atmosphere_and_lif: Zaɓi tsakiya, saman, sararin iska, da rayuwa. Duba irin duniyar da ka yi.
hausa.pulsars_are_spinning_neutron_stars_wit: Pulsar taurarin neutron ne masu juyawa da hasken maganadisu. Duniya tana ganin buga kawai idan hasken ya share ta.
hausa.a_pulsar_is_a_rapidly_rotating_neutron: Pulsar tauraron neutron ne mai saurin juyawa. Sandunansa na maganadisu suna fitar da hasken radiation. Muna ganin buga kawai idan hasken ya share mu — kamar hasken teku. Wasu suna bugawa sau 700 a dakika. Jocelyn Bell Burnell ta gano na farko a 1967.
hausa.stream_of_charged_particles_from_sun_h: Igiyar ɓangarori masu caji daga Rana, tana bugun Duniya. Iska mai ƙarfi = ƙarin haskoki + tarnaƙin GPS.
hausa.solar_wind_is_a_stream_of_charged_part: Iskar rana igiya ce ta ɓangarori masu caji (galibi proton + electron) da ke gudana daga Rana kullum. Sauri yana tsakanin 250-800 km/s. Guguwa mai ƙarfi tana haifar da haskoki + tana iya tarnaƙe GPS + wutar lantarki. Al'amarin Carrington na 1859: telegraf sun yi walƙiya sun kama wuta.
hausa.the_iss_orbits_earth_every_90_minutes_: ISS na kewaya Duniya kowane minti 90. Wani lokaci cikin haske, wani lokaci cikin inuwar Duniya.
hausa.the_iss_orbits_400_km_up_at_17_500_mph: ISS na kewayawa a kilomita 400 sama a 17,500 mph (28,000 km/h). Yana kammala kewaya ɗaya kowane minti 90 — don haka ƴan sama jannati suna ganin fitowar rana + faɗuwarta sau 16 a rana. ISS shi ne abu mafi girma da mutane suka gina a sararin samaniya.
hausa.voyager_1_2_launched_1977_they_are_now: An harba Voyager 1 + 2 a 1977. Yanzu suna cikin sararin tsakanin taurari; Voyager 1 ya ƙetare heliopause a 2012, Voyager 2 kuma a 2018.
hausa.voyagers_1_2_launched_1977_to_study_ou: An harba Voyager 1 + 2 a 1977 don nazarin duniyoyin waje. Duka biyun sun ƙetare heliopause (iyakar iskar rana) a 2012 + 2018 — yanzu suna cikin sararin tsakanin taurari. Kowanne yana ɗauke da Faifan Zinariya mai gaisuwa + waƙa ga duk baƙon da zai same su.
hausa.mercury_passes_in_front_of_the_sun_eve: Mercury tana wucewa gaban Rana kowace ƴan shekaru. Kalli tana ƙetarewa — amma da matatar rana mai kyau kaɗai.
hausa.watch_with_proper_solar_filter_only_ne: Kalli da matatar rana MAI KYAU kaɗai — KADA KA taɓa kallon kai tsaye!
hausa.a_transit_happens_when_mercury_or_venu: Wucewa tana faruwa idan Mercury (ko Venus) ta wuce tsakanin Duniya + Rana. Tana kama da ƙaramin baƙin ɗigo a kan Rana. Wucewar Mercury ta gaba: 13 ga Nuwamba, 2032. Wucewar Venus ta gaba: Disamba 2117 — ba za ta sake faruwa ba har 2125.
hausa.l_on_foucault_1851_proved_earth_rotate: Léon Foucault ya tabbatar a 1851 cewa Duniya tana juyawa da babban rataccen abu. Fuskar lilon sa tana juyawa da sauri a sandunan.
hausa.l_on_foucault_1851_demonstrated_earth_: Léon Foucault ya nuna juyawar Duniya a 1851 da babban rataccen abu. Fuskar lilon sa tana bayyana tana juyawa saboda Duniya tana juyawa ƙarƙashinsa. A sandunan: awanni 24. A equator: ba ta juyawa. A Maine: ~awanni 34.
hausa.saturn_s_north_pole_has_a_perfect_hexa: Sandan arewa na Saturn yana da cikakkiyar guguwa mai kusurwa shida mai faɗin kilomita 30,000. Voyager ya gano ta a 1981.
hausa.saturn_s_hexagonal_pole_storm: Guguwar Sandan Saturn Mai Kusurwa Shida
hausa.persistent_feature_30_000_km_wide_5_ea: Halayya mai dawwama mai faɗin kilomita 30,000 — fiye da ninki 2 na diamitar Duniya
hausa.saturn_has_a_perfect_hexagonal_storm_a: Saturn tana da cikakkiyar guguwa mai kusurwa shida a sandan arewa — Voyager ne ya fara ɗaukar hotonta (1981), Cassini kuma ya tabbatar. Kusurwa shidan tana da faɗin kilomita 30,000 kuma mai dawwama. Me ya sa kusurwa shida? Tsarin igiyar iskar jet + kalaman Rossby.
hausa.the_original_clock_as_the_sun_arcs_acr: Agogon farko. Yayin da Rana ke wucewa sararin sama, sandar tana jefa inuwa mai juyawa da ke nuna awanni.
hausa.sundials_predate_clocks_by_millennia_a: Agogon rana ya riga agogo da dubban shekaru. Yayin da Rana ke wucewa sararin sama, inuwar sandar tana juyawa. Tsoffin Masarawa, Girkawa, Romawa, Sinawa duk sun gina agogon rana masu daidai. Na zamani suna buƙatar gyara don lokacin ceton hasken rana + ma'aunin lokaci.
hausa.80_galaxies_span_10_million_light_year: Galaxy 80 sun miƙe shekarun haske miliyan 10 kewaye da mu. Hanyar Madara + Andromeda na iya karo cikin kimanin shekaru biliyan 4-5 — nazarin 2025 ya sa damar kusa da 50/50.
hausa.160k_ly_satellite_of_milky_way: ly 160k — tauraron ɗan adam na Hanyar Madara
hausa.25k_ly_closest_to_mw: ly 25k — mafi kusa da Hanyar Madara
hausa.local_group_80_galaxies_in_10_million_: Ƙungiyar Gida — galaxy ~80 cikin shekarun haske miliyan 10
hausa.our_local_group_has_80_galaxies_domina: Ƙungiyar Gidanmu tana da galaxy ~80 da Hanyar Madara + Andromeda suka mamaye. Andromeda tana kusantowa a 110 km/s — karo mai yiwuwa cikin kimanin shekaru biliyan 4-5. Idan ya faru: babbar galaxy Milkomeda.
hausa.what_size_asteroid_kills_which_level_o: Wane girman asteroid ne ke kashe wane matakin rayuwa? Kwatanta daga tsakuwa zuwa mai kashe dinosaur.
hausa.atmospheric_entry_destroys_most_rocks_: Shiga sararin iska yana lalata yawancin duwatsu < 5m. Chelyabinsk 2013 (20m) ya farfashe tagogi amma babu rami. Tunguska 1908 (50m) ya lalata 2000km² na daji. Chicxulub 66Ma (10km) ya kashe dinosaur.
hausa.a_cme_blasts_billions_of_tons_of_plasm: CME yana harba biliyoyin ton na plasma daga Rana. Bayan kwanaki, yana iya haifar da haskoki masu ban sha'awa + gazawar GPS.
hausa.a_coronal_mass_ejection_blasts_billion: Fitar Nauyin Corona yana harba biliyoyin ton na plasma zuwa sararin samaniya a miliyan 1-2 mph. Yana ɗaukar kwanaki 1-5 kafin ya kai Duniya. CME masu ƙarfi suna haifar da guguwar maganadisu, haskoki masu haske, kuma suna iya tarnaƙe tauraron ɗan adam + wutar lantarki.
hausa.cepheids_pulse_on_a_regular_cycle_thei: Cepheid suna bugawa a zagaye na yau da kullum. Tsawon lokacinsu yana bayyana ainihin hasken su — ma'aunin sararin samaniya.
hausa.cepheid_variables_pulse_on_a_regular_c: Taurarin Cepheid masu sauyawa suna bugawa a zagaye na yau da kullum. Tsawon lokacinsu yana da alaƙa kai tsaye da ainihin hasken su (Henrietta Leavitt 1908). Masana taurari suna auna tsawon lokacin + suna amfani da shi don tantance ainihin haske + nisa.
hausa.comet_orbit_drawer: ☄ Mai Zana Kewayar Tauraro Mai Wutsiya
hausa.orbits_range_from_circles_to_long_elli: Kewayoyi suna daga da'ira zuwa dogayen siffofin ƙwai. Daidaita karkata don zana hanyoyi kamar na duniya ko na tauraro mai wutsiya.
hausa.orbital_eccentricity_goes_from_0_perfe: Karkatar kewaya tana daga 0 (cikakkiyar da'ira) zuwa 1 (tserewar parabolic). Duniyoyi kusan da'ira ne. Taurari masu wutsiya suna da siffar ƙwai sosai — suna kusantar Rana + suna nisa zuwa tsarin waje. Kewayoyin hyperbolic (e>1) na nufin wucewa sau ɗaya kawai ta tsarin rana.
hausa.earth_s_atmosphere_blocks_most_wavelen: Sararin iskar Duniya yana toshe tsawon zango da yawa. Hasken da ake gani, rediyo, da wasu tagogin infrared suna kai ƙasa.
hausa.visible_light_radio_waves_penetrate_th: ✔ Hasken da ake gani, kalaman rediyo, da wasu infrared suna kai ƙasa
hausa.earth_atmosphere_blocks_most_wavelengt: Sararin iskar Duniya yana toshe tsawon zango da yawa. Hasken da ake gani, rediyo, da wasu tagogin infrared suna kai ƙasa; UV, X-ray, gamma-ray, da yawancin ilimin infrared suna buƙatar cibiyoyin lura da ke sararin samaniya kamar Hubble, JWST, Chandra, da Fermi.
hausa.spectra_reveal_temperature_composition_m: Spectrum yana bayyana zafi, abin da ya ƙunsa, motsi, da alamun matakin cigaban abu.
hausa.cool_giant_atmosphere_4000_k: Sararin iskar katon tauraro mai sanyi: kusan 4,000 K
hausa.excited_gas_10000_k: Iskar gas mai kuzari: yawanci kusan 10,000 K
hausa.expanding_ejecta_thousands_km_s: Abin da aka fitar yana faɗaɗawa: dubban km/s
hausa.spectral_line_strength_caution: Ƙarfin layi ba ma'aunin yawa mai sauƙi ba ne: zafi, kauri, da ionization suma suna tantance waɗanne halaye ne suka fi bayyana. Waɗannan lanƙwasa samfuran koyarwa ne da aka sauƙaƙa.
hausa.spectra_life_paths_note: Waɗannan misalan ba jadawali ɗaya ba ne: tauraro kamar Rana na iya zama jan katon tauraro da nebula na duniya, yayin da supernova nau'in II ke kawo ƙarshen rayuwar babban tauraro.
hausa.earth_rotates_15_per_hour_watch_when_i: Duniya tana juyawa 15° kowace awa. Kalli lokacin da tsakar rana ta yi a Tokyo, lokacin da rana ta fito a Portland.
hausa.earth_rotates_15_per_hour_utc_coordina: Duniya tana juyawa 15° kowace awa. UTC (Lokacin Duniya da Aka Daidaita) shi ne tushen duniya. Yankunan lokaci suna bambanta da ±awanni. Portland ta Maine tana UTC-5 (EST) ko UTC-4 (EDT). A duniya, rabin Duniya yana cikin haske yayin da rabi ke cikin dare.
hausa.mind_blowing_facts_gallery: 💡 Nunin Gaskiyar Da Ke Ba Da Mamaki
hausa.click_through_12_astronomy_facts_that_: Danna ta cikin gaskiya 12 na ilimin taurari da ke ƙalubalantar hankali.
hausa.textbook_diagrams_lie_the_moon_is_much: Zanen littattafai ƙarya ne. Wata ya fi nisa fiye da yadda aka zana. Duba ainihin ma'aunin.
hausa.most_textbooks_draw_the_moon_too_big_t: Yawancin littattafai suna zana Wata da girma sosai + kusa sosai. Gaskiya: diamitar Wata kashi 1/4 ne na Duniya, kuma nisa zuwa Wata ~diamitar Duniya 30 ne. Haske yana ɗaukar dakika 1.3 don tafiyar.
hausa.jupiter_has_the_shortest_day_10_hr_ven: Jupiter yana da rana mafi guntu (awa 10). Venus tana da mafi tsawo (kwanaki 243 na Duniya!).
hausa.day_length_across_the_solar_system_log: Tsawon rana a Tsarin Rana baki ɗaya (ma'aunin log)
hausa.jupiter_spins_fast_venus_rotates_slowe: Jupiter yana juyawa da sauri. Venus tana juyawa a hankali fiye da shekararta.
hausa.gas_giants_spin_fast_because_of_how_th: Manyan duniyoyin gas suna juyawa da sauri saboda yadda suka samu. Venus tana juyawa a hankali sosai, mai yiwuwa saboda hawan ruwan rana + jan sararin iska mai kauri. Duniya tana raguwa da ~milli-dakika 1.7 kowane ƙarni saboda ƙarfin jawo na Wata.
hausa.total_eclipses_cover_narrow_strips_the: Cikakken kusufi yana rufe ratsi kunkuntar. Hanyar kusufin 2024 ta ratsa arewacin Maine.
hausa.april_8_2024_total_solar_eclipse_path: Hanyar Cikakken Kusufin Rana na 8 ga Afrilu, 2024
hausa.total_solar_eclipses_only_happen_along: Cikakken kusufin rana yana faruwa a hanyoyi kunkuntar ~kilomita 100-150 faɗi kawai. Kusufin 8 ga Afrilu, 2024 ya ratsa arewacin Maine — mutanen Maine da yawa sun yi tafiya arewa don ganin cikakken. Cikakken kusufi na gaba da za a gani daga Maine: 1 ga Mayu, 2079.
hausa.sagan_s_cosmic_calendar_13_8_billion_y: Kalandar Sararin Samaniya na Sagan: shekaru biliyan 13.8 cikin shekara ɗaya. Mutane sun iso a dakika ta ƙarshe.
hausa.carl_sagan_s_cosmic_calendar_compresse: Kalandar Sararin Samaniya na Carl Sagan: tana matsa shekaru biliyan 13.8 cikin shekara 1. Babban Fashewa = 1 ga Janairu. Yanzu = tsakar daren 31 ga Disamba. Mutane sun bayyana a dakikun ƙarshe. Wayewa suna cikin ƙaramin ɓangaren dakika ta ƙarshe.
hausa.how_many_alien_civilizations_adjust_ea: Wayewar baƙi nawa? Daidaita kowane abin da ba a sani ba + ka ga amsar.
hausa.in_our_milky_way_galaxy_at_any_time: a cikin Galaxy ɗinmu na Hanyar Madara a kowane lokaci
hausa.ne_habitable_per_system: ne: Adadin da ake iya zama a kowane tsari
hausa.frank_drake_1961_estimating_other_civi: Frank Drake 1961: kiyasta sauran wayewa. Yawancin abubuwan ba a san su ba — amsoshi daga <1 (mu kaɗai) zuwa miliyoyi. Yana bayyana abin da ba mu sani ba fiye da bayar da amsa. Daidaita silolin don ganin yadda sakamakon ke da hankali.
hausa.dozen_biggest_best_telescopes_hubble_j: Manyan telescope goma sha biyu mafi girma + mafi kyau: Hubble, JWST, Keck, VLT, ALMA, da abin da suke lura da shi.
hausa.hubble_space_telescope: Telescope na Sararin Samaniya na Hubble
hausa.optical_uv_ir_space_telescope_30_year_: Telescope na sararin samaniya na gani/UV/IR. Sabis na shekaru 30+.
hausa.infrared_space_telescope_at_l2_lagrang: Telescope na sararin samaniya na infrared. A wurin Lagrange L2.
hausa.twin_10m_telescopes_on_mauna_kea_hawai: Telescope tagwaye masu mita 10 a Mauna Kea, Hawaii.
hausa.eso_chile_four_8_2m_telescopes: ESO Chile, telescope huɗu masu mita 8.2.
hausa.twin_8m_mauna_kea_cerro_pach_n: Tagwaye masu mita 8: Mauna Kea + Cerro Pachón.
hausa.66_antenna_radio_array_chilean_desert: Tsarin rediyo mai eriya 66, hamadar Chile.
hausa.optical_uv_ir_space_telescope_still_op: Telescope na sararin samaniya na gani/UV/IR. Har yanzu yana aiki.
hausa.chandra_x_ray_observatory: Cibiyar Lura da X-ray ta Chandra
hausa.nasa_x_ray_space_telescope: Telescope na sararin samaniya na X-ray na NASA.
hausa.spitzer_space_telescope: Telescope na Sararin Samaniya na Spitzer
hausa.infrared_space_telescope_retired_2020: Telescope na sararin samaniya na infrared, an yi ritaya 2020.
hausa.japanese_8_2m_on_mauna_kea: Na Japan mai mita 8.2 a Mauna Kea.
hausa.future_radio_telescope_australia_s_afr: Telescope na rediyo na gaba, Ostiraliya + Afirka ta Kudu.
hausa.coming_39m_eso_telescope_chile: Telescope na ESO mai mita 39 mai zuwa. Chile.
hausa.a_dozen_of_the_world_s_most_powerful_t: Goma sha biyu daga cikin telescope mafi ƙarfi a duniya. Buɗi (cm) shi ne diamitar madubi na farko. Babban buɗi = ƙarin haske + ƙarin bayani. Telescope na sararin samaniya suna guje wa gurbatar sararin iska.
hausa.massive_stars_live_fast_die_young_adju: Manyan taurari suna rayuwa da sauri + suna mutuwa da wuri. Daidaita nauyi + ka ga tsawon lokacin da tauraro ke ƙonewa.
hausa.massive_stars_burn_fuel_fast_lifespan_: Manyan taurari suna ƙona man fetur da sauri. Tsawon rai ∝ M^-2.5. Rana: Gyr 10 (muna tsakiya). 10 M☉: Myr 30 kawai. Jan tauraro ƙarami na 0.1 M☉: tiriliyoyin shekaru.
hausa.track_your_progress_planets_explored_p: Bi diddigin cigabanka: duniyoyin da ka bincika, makin da ka samu, ayyukan da ka rubuta.
hausa.this_tool_features_35_interactive_mini: Wannan kayan aiki yana da ƙananan kayan aiki 35+ masu mu'amala da suka shafi ilimin taurari, kimiyyar lissafi, da bincike. Daga kwaikwayon baƙaƙen ramuka zuwa tuƙa na'urar saukowa a Wata, za ka iya bincika Tsarin Rana da abin da ke bayansa.
hausa.16_milestones_from_ancient_greek_astro: Muhimman abubuwa 16 daga ilimin taurarin Girka na dā zuwa JWST. Sunayen da ya kamata ka sani.
hausa.a_2300_year_journey_from_aristarchus_t: Tafiya ta shekaru 2300 daga Aristarchus zuwa JWST. Kowane bincike ya gina kan na baya. Kimiyya tsere ne na mika sanda — kowane masanin taurari yana tsaye kan kafaɗun waɗanda suka gabace shi.
hausa.compare_spectral_classes_temperature_fin: Kwatanta ajujuwan zafin saman da alamun yatsa na spectrum da ke bayyana su.
hausa.spectral_class_size_caution: An sa girman da'irori daidai da gangan. Ajin spectrum yana bayyana zafi da tsarin layuka, ba radius ko haske shi kaɗai ba; ajin haske V na nufin babban jeri, III na nufin katon tauraro, I kuma na nufin katon tauraro mai girma.
hausa.m_class_dwarf_supergiant_note: Haruffa ɗaya na iya haɗa taurari daban-daban sosai: Proxima Centauri ƙaramin tauraron M ne, yayin da Betelgeuse katon tauraron M ne mai girma. Rana ita ce G2 V.
hausa.mars_vs_earth_atmosphere: 🌐 Sararin Iskar Mars da na Duniya
hausa.mars_has_100_thinner_air_made_of_mostl: Mars tana da iska mai siriri sau 100× da galibi CO₂ ce. Kwatanta abin da iskar gas ta ƙunsa + matsi.
hausa.mars_atmosphere_is_100_thinner_than_ea: Sararin iskar Mars ya fi na Duniya siriri sau 100×. Abin da ya ƙunsa: kashi 95% CO₂. Don numfashi a Mars za ka buƙaci oxygen + matsi sau 100× fiye. Kusan babu nitrojin don takin ƙasa.
hausa.10_essential_black_hole_terms_event_ho: Muhimman kalmomi 10 na baƙin rami: sararin taron, wurin farko, tsagewar spaghetti, radiation na Hawking.
hausa.event_horizon_telescope_captured_first: Telescope na Sararin Taron ya ɗauki hoton farko na baƙin ramin M87* (2019) + Sgr A* (2022). Zoben lemu = hasken da ya lanƙwasa kewaye da baƙin ƙwallo inda haske ba zai iya tserewa ba.
hausa.auroras_across_solar_system: 🌈 Haskoki A Tsarin Rana Baki Ɗaya
hausa.five_planets_have_auroras_earth_s_is_g: Duniyoyi biyar suna da haskoki. Na Duniya kore/ja ne, na Jupiter shi ne mafi ƙarfi, na Mars kuma warwatse ne.
hausa.green_oxygen_red_atomic_o_blue_nitroge: Kore (oxygen) + ja (O na atom) + shuɗi (nitrojin). Ana ganin su sosai kusa da sandunan maganadisu.
hausa.most_powerful_in_solar_system_driven_b: Mafi ƙarfi a tsarin rana. Aman wutar Io + filin maganadisu na Jupiter ne ke tuƙa shi. Haskokin UV na dindindin.
hausa.powered_by_solar_wind_less_colorful_th: Iskar rana ce ke ba da ƙarfi. Ba su da launi kamar na Duniya amma suna da girma. Suna ɗaukar kwanaki a lokaci ɗaya.
hausa.strange_orientation_due_to_98_axial_ti: Yanayi mai ban mamaki saboda karkatar gwani na 98°. Yana da wuya a ɗauki hoto.
hausa.weak_no_global_magnetic_field_auroras_: Rauni — babu filin maganadisu na duniya baki ɗaya. Haskoki suna kewaye da sauran maganadisun ɓawo.
hausa.10_missions_that_defined_planetary_exp: Ayyuka 10 da suka bayyana binciken duniyoyi. Daga Apollo zuwa Cassini zuwa JWST.
hausa.first_humans_walk_on_moon: Mutane na farko sun yi tafiya a Wata
hausa.first_mars_landers_life_experiments: Na'urorin saukowa na farko a Mars + gwaje-gwajen rayuwa
hausa.nuclear_powered_rover_still_active: Rover mai amfani da nukiliya, har yanzu yana aiki
hausa.first_close_up_of_pluto_arrokoth: Hoton kusa na farko na Pluto + Arrokoth
hausa.rover_first_mars_helicopter: Rover + jirgin sama mai saukar ungulu na farko a Mars
hausa.replaced_hubble_for_infrared_deep_fiel: Yana cika Hubble da filayen zurfi na infrared
hausa.brightness_counts_backward_smaller_bri: Ana ƙidayar haske ta baya: ƙarami = mai haske. Kewayon da ake gani ya kai matakai 60.
hausa.magnitudes_count_backward_smaller_brig: Ana ƙidayar matakan haske TA BAYA: ƙarami = mai haske. Kowane mataki na 5 = sau 100× haske. Hipparchus ya ƙirƙira a 130 KHM. Rana: -26.7. JWST yana gani har mataki 34. Kewayo: 100^((34-(-26))/5) ≈ sau 10^24 rauni fiye da Rana.
hausa.four_ways_astronomers_describe_positio: Hanyoyi huɗu da masana taurari ke bayyana wurare a sararin sama.
hausa.star_fixed_coordinates_right_ascension: Ma'auni da suka daidaita da taurari. Hawan dama (h:m:s) + Karkata (°). Ana amfani da su a jerin taurari.
hausa.observer_centered_altitude_above_horiz: Mai kallo ne tsakiya. Tsawo (sama da sararin sama) + Azimuth (daga arewa). Ana amfani da su don juya telescope.
hausa.centered_on_sun_earth_plane_used_for_s: Fuskar Rana-Duniya ce tsakiya. Ana amfani da shi ga abubuwan tsarin rana.
hausa.centered_on_milky_way_plane_used_for_g: Fuskar Hanyar Madara ce tsakiya. Ana amfani da shi ga nazarin galaxy.
hausa.astronomers_use_multiple_coordinate_sy: Masana taurari suna amfani da tsarin ma'auni da yawa. Na equator na duniya ne + abubuwa suna riƙe ma'auni iri ɗaya yayin da Duniya ke juyawa. Alt-Az yana canzawa kullum yayin da Duniya ke juyawa. Na galaxy ya fi kyau don nazarin tsarin Hanyar Madara.
hausa.from_1_sun_to_10_22_stars_the_scale_of: Daga Rana 1 zuwa taurari 10^22. Girman sararin samaniya yana ba da mamaki.
hausa.astronomy_operates_on_absurd_scales_ho: Ilimin taurari yana aiki a ma'auni marasa gaskatuwa. 'Taurari nawa?' — fiye da tsakuwar yashi a kowane bakin teku a Duniya. 'Shekaru nawa?' — biliyan 13.8. Duk da haka wasu adadi (ƙafewar baƙin rami) sun ma fi girma.
hausa.space_debris_tracker: 🛰 Mai Bin Diddigin Tarkacen Sararin Samaniya
hausa.36_500_objects_orbit_earth_at_various_: Abubuwa 36,500 suna kewaya Duniya a tsawo daban-daban. Motsa silar tsawo don ganin abin da ke can.
hausa.36_500_tracked_objects_millions_of_fra: Abubuwa 36,500 da ake bi diddigi + miliyoyin guntuwa suna kewaya Duniya. Haɗarin Ciwon Kessler: jerin karo da ke sa sararin samaniya mara amfani. SpaceX Starlink yana da tauraron ɗan adam 5000+; suna shirin ƙari da yawa.
hausa.every_culture_sees_stories_in_the_star: Kowace al'ada tana ganin labarai a taurari. Daga jarumai Girkawa zuwa Emu A Sararin Sama na 'yan asalin Ostiraliya.
hausa.stories_projected_onto_stars_by_cultur: Labaran da al'adu a duniya suka jefa kan taurari. Emu A Sararin Sama na 'yan asalin Ostiraliya yana amfani da baƙaƙen gajimaren ƙura. Masu shiryawa na Polynesia suna amfani da taurari don ratsa Pasifik ta hanyar tunawa. Ilimin taurari kuma labari ne.
hausa.5_ways_astronomers_find_planets_around: Hanyoyi 5 da masana taurari ke samun duniyoyi kewaye da sauran taurari. Wucewa + Doppler sun fi yawa.
hausa.watch_a_star_and_look_for_tiny_brightn: Kalli tauraro ka nemi ɗan raguwar haske idan duniya ta wuce gabansa. Kepler + TESS suna amfani da ita.
hausa.a_planet_s_gravity_makes_its_star_wobb: Ƙarfin jawo na duniya yana sa tauraronta ya girgiza. Muna ganin girgizar a matsayin canjin Doppler a hasken tauraro.
hausa.gravity_of_a_passing_star_planet_bends: Ƙarfin jawo na tauraro+duniya da ke wucewa yana lanƙwasa haske daga tauraro mai nisa. Bai dogara da nisa ba.
hausa.block_out_the_star_s_light_photograph_: Toshe hasken tauraro + ɗaukar hoton duniyoyin da ke kusa. Har yanzu tana aiki ga manyan duniyoyi/masu nisa kawai.
hausa.variations_in_pulsar_pulses_reveal_orb: Sauyi a bugun pulsar yana bayyana jikunan da ke kewayawa. An sami duniyoyin waje na farko ta wannan hanya (1992).
hausa.first_exoplanet_around_a_sun_like_star: Duniyar waje ta farko kewaye da tauraro kamar Rana: 51 Pegasi b (1995). Yanzu an tabbatar da 6,300+. JWST yana yin spectroscopy na sararin iska a duniyoyin waje — yana neman alamun rayuwa.
hausa.schedule_of_eclipses_2024_2079_maine_s: Jadawalin kusufi 2024-2079. Cikakken kusufin rana na gaba a Maine: 2079.
hausa.total_solar_eclipses_are_rare_about_2_: Cikakken kusufin rana ba kasafai ba ne. Kimanin ɗaya kowane wata 18 a wani wuri a Duniya, amma ana ganin kowanne daga hanya kunkuntar kawai. Ana ganin kusufin wata a duk gefen dare.
hausa.hubble_s_classification_spirals_ellipt: Rarrabuwar Hubble: masu karkacewa, masu siffar ƙwai, marasa tsari + duk abin da ke tsakani.
hausa.tight_arms_big_central_bulge: Hannaye masu matsewa, babbar kumburi a tsakiya
hausa.forming_stars_rapidly: Tana samar da taurari cikin sauri
hausa.edwin_hubble_classified_galaxies_in_19: Edwin Hubble ya rarraba galaxy a 1936 — 'cokalin mai tsara Hubble.' Masu karkacewa + masu siffar ƙwai + marasa tsari. Galaxy suna cigaba ta haɗuwa — Hanyar Madara tana tsakiyar rayuwarta; haɗuwa da Andromeda na iya faruwa cikin biliyoyin shekaru (nazarin 2025 ya sa damar kusa da 50/50).
hausa.from_walking_to_light_speed_log_scale_: Daga tafiya zuwa saurin haske (ma'aunin log). Voyager 1 shi ne abu mafi nisa da mutane suka yi kuma ɗaya daga cikin na'urorinmu masu sauri, amma har yanzu jinkiri ne idan aka kwatanta da sararin samaniya.
hausa.voyager_1_is_the_fastest_object_humans: Voyager 1 yana da sauri idan aka kwatanta da jiragen sama kuma yanzu shi ne abu mafi nisa da mutane suka yi, duk da haka zai ɗauki kimanin shekaru 80,000 kafin ya kai tauraro mafi kusa. Haske yana yin wannan tafiya cikin shekaru 4.
hausa.watch_stars_form_from_cold_dust_to_hot: Kalli taurari suna samuwa daga ƙura mai sanyi zuwa rana mai zafi. Matakai 6 cikin ƴan miliyoyin shekaru.
hausa.stars_are_born_in_clusters_from_giant_: Ana haihuwar taurari a rukuni daga manyan gajimaren molecule. Jimlar tsari: ƴan miliyoyin shekaru. Shahararrun misalai: Nebula na Orion (M42), Nebula na Gaggafa (Ginshiƙan Halitta), Nebula na Tarantula.
hausa.10_of_the_deepest_open_questions_in_co: 10 daga cikin tambayoyi mafi zurfi da ke buɗe a ilimin sararin samaniya. Wasu suna da amsa ta ɓangare; wasu asiri ne tsantsa.
hausa.quick_table_of_planet_properties_diame: Teburi mai sauri na halayen duniyoyi. Diamita, ƙarfin jawo, tsawon rana, watanni.
hausa.side_by_side_comparison_of_key_planet_: Kwatancen gefe-da-gefe na muhimman halayen duniyoyi. Duniya = tushe. Rana kusan sau 109 diamitar Duniya (fiye da miliyan sau girmanta). Jupiter yana da watanni 115 da aka sani. Venus tana juyawa a hankali har ranarta ta fi shekararta tsawo.
hausa.40_visual_interactive_mini_tools_made_: Ƙananan kayan aiki 40+ masu gani + mu'amala. An yi su ga ɗalibai + manya masu sha'awa.
hausa.40_interactive_mini_tools_svg_visualiz: Ƙananan kayan aiki 40+ masu mu'amala, hotunan SVG, da kwaikwayon ilimi.
hausa.from_a_moon_phase_dial_to_a_black_hole: Daga faifan matakan wata zuwa mai nuna baƙin rami zuwa rataccen Foucault, an gina kowane kayan aiki don sa ra'ayoyi marasa gani su zama masu ji + masu wasa.
hausa.built_for_k_12_curious_adults_open_all: An gina shi ga K-12 + manya masu sha'awa. Buɗe dukkan kayan aikin, ko ɗaya kawai — kowanne yana aiki shi kaɗai.
hausa.part_of_alloflow_stem_lab_built_in_mai: Wani ɓangare na AlloFlow STEM Lab. An gina shi a Maine, Amurka. An samo dukkan bayanai daga NASA, ESA, JAXA, USGS, IAU + tushen kimiyya na jama'a. Amfani na ilimi kyauta ne.
hausa.9_annual_meteor_showers_their_best_vie: Ruwan duwatsun sararin samaniya 9 na shekara + kwanakin da suka fi kyau don kallo. Yi alama a kalandarka.
hausa.meteor_showers_happen_when_earth_cross: Ruwan duwatsun sararin samaniya yana faruwa idan Duniya ta ƙetare igiyar tarkacen tauraro mai wutsiya. Kallo mafi kyau: wuri mai duhu, babu Wata, bayan tsakar dare. Perseids + Geminids sun fi kowane amincewa a shekara.
hausa.10_quotes_from_astronomers_space_trave: Maganganu 10 daga masana taurari + matafiya sararin samaniya da suka ƙunshi mamaki.
hausa.tonight_sky_observing_guide: 🔭 Jagoran Kallon Sararin Sama Yau Da Dare
hausa.10_things_you_can_spot_tonight_with_ju: Abubuwa 10 da za ka iya gani yau da dare da idanunka kawai ko da binocular.
hausa.best_naked_eye_observing_dark_site_awa: Kallon ido tsirara mafi kyau: wuri mai duhu (nesa da hasken birni), Wata ƙasa da sararin sama, idanu sun saba (minti 20-30 a duhu). App na kyauta: Stellarium, SkyView, Star Walk suna taimakawa gane abin da kake gani.
hausa.carl_sagan_s_most_quoted_reflection_a_: Tunanin Carl Sagan da aka fi ambata. Ɗigo ɗaya da ke ɗauke da kowa da muka taɓa sani.
hausa.from_this_distant_vantage_point_the_ea: "Daga wannan wuri mai nisa, Duniya ba ta da wata sha'awa ta musamman. Amma a gare mu, ya bambanta. Sake duba wannan ɗigon. Wannan nan ne. Wannan gida ne. Wannan mu ne. A kansa ne kowa da kake so, kowa da ka sani, kowa da ka taɓa ji labarinsa, kowane mutum da ya taɓa rayuwa, ya rayu rayuwarsa."
hausa.voyager_1_took_this_photo_of_earth_fro: Voyager 1 ya ɗauki wannan hoton Duniya daga nisan kilomita biliyan 6 a ranar 14 ga Fabrairu, 1990 — bisa buƙatar Carl Sagan. Duniya ɗigo ɗaya ce. Kowane mutum a tarihi ya rayu a kan wannan ɗigon.
hausa.8_iconic_deep_sky_objects_star_nurseri: Abubuwa 8 masu shahara na zurfin sararin sama. Wuraren haihuwar taurari, ɓawon taurari masu mutuwa, sauran supernova.
hausa.stellar_nursery_24_ly_across_visible_n: Wurin haihuwar taurari mai faɗin ly 24. Ana gani da ido tsirara a Takobin Orion.
hausa.remains_of_supernova_witnessed_in_1054: Sauran supernova da aka gani a 1054 AZ. Yana ɗauke da pulsar.
hausa.planetary_nebula_in_lyra_glowing_shell: Nebula na duniya a Lyra. Ɓawo mai haskakawa daga tauraro kamar Rana da ke mutuwa.
hausa.home_of_pillars_of_creation_hubble_199: Gidan Ginshiƙan Halitta (Hubble 1995). Ginshiƙan samuwar taurari.
hausa.complex_planetary_nebula_many_shell_la: Nebula na duniya mai rikitarwa. Layukan ɓawo da yawa daga bugawa.
hausa.closest_planetary_nebula_looks_like_an: Nebula na duniya mafi kusa. Yana kama da ido a sararin samaniya.
hausa.in_large_magellanic_cloud_largest_know: A Babban Gajimaren Magellan. Yankin samuwar taurari mafi girma da aka sani.
hausa.supernova_remnant_8000_years_old_massi: Sauran supernova mai shekaru ~8000. Manyan baka a Cygnus.
hausa.what_you_need_to_start_observing_from_: Abin da kake buƙata don fara kallo — daga app na kyauta zuwa telescope da suka dace da kowane kasafi.
hausa.free_planetarium_software_shows_night_: Software na planetarium kyauta. Yana nuna sararin dare daga ko'ina, kowane lokaci.
hausa.phone_app_point_at_sky_to_identify_wha: App na waya. Ka nuna wa sararin sama don gane abin da kake kallo.
hausa.interactive_3d_solar_system_jwst_missi: Tsarin rana 3D mai mu'amala + JWST + hotunan ayyuka.
hausa.best_starter_scope_reveals_galilean_mo: Kayan farawa mafi kyau. Yana bayyana watannin Galileo na Jupiter, Andromeda, rukunin Pleiades.
hausa.celestron_starsense_explorer_102_or_or: Celestron StarSense Explorer 102 ko Orion 4.5" Newtonian.
hausa.celestron_nexstar_8se_or_apertura_ad8_: Celestron NexStar 8SE ko Apertura AD8 Dobsonian.
hausa.most_cities_have_one_members_lend_scop: Yawancin birane suna da ɗaya. Membobi suna ba da telescope aro, suna koyarwa, suna gudanar da bikin taurari.
hausa.drive_30_min_from_city_lights_maine_is: Tuƙi minti 30+ daga hasken birni. Maine cike take da su. Katahdin Woods and Waters wuri ne da aka tabbatar na sararin duhu.
hausa.most_important_tool_dark_sky_light_pol: Kayan aiki mafi muhimmanci: sararin duhu. Gurɓatar haske tana share kashi 90% na taurari. Katahdin Woods and Waters NM da AMC Maine Woods wurare ne da aka tabbatar na Sararin Duhu na Duniya; Acadia da Baxter suma suna da kyawawan sararin duhu.
hausa.star_s_fate_depends_on_mass_brown_dwar: Ƙarshen tauraro ya dogara da nauyi: launin ruwan ƙasa ƙarami, farin ƙarami, tauraron neutron, ko baƙin rami.
hausa.how_a_star_dies_depends_almost_entirel: Yadda tauraro ke mutuwa kusan gaba ɗaya ya dogara da nauyinsa na farko. Iyaka tsakanin tauraron neutron + baƙin rami ba a tabbatar ba (iyakar Tolman-Oppenheimer-Volkoff ~2-3 M☉ ga sauran).
hausa.from_1km_to_93_billion_light_years_ref: Daga kilomita 1 zuwa shekarun haske biliyan 93. Teburin tunatarwa na ma'aunin sararin samaniya.
hausa.distances_jump_in_scale_km_to_au_to_ly: Nisa yana tsalle a ma'auni: km zuwa AU zuwa ly zuwa biliyoyin ly. Kowane mataki ~sau 10,000-100,000 ne girma. Ilimin taurari yana rayuwa a ma'aunin log.
hausa.maine_has_world_class_dark_skies_what_: Maine tana da sararin duhu na matakin duniya. Abin da za a nema kowane yanayi.
hausa.maine_has_fantastic_dark_skies_especia: Maine tana da sararin duhu mai ban mamaki — musamman arewa da birane. Katahdin Woods and Waters NM da AMC Maine Woods wurare ne da aka tabbatar na Sararin Duhu na Duniya; Acadia, Allagash, Baxter, da Cobscook suma suna da duhu mai kyau. Daren hunturu yana da tsawo + tsafta ƙwarai.
hausa.major_space_missions_events_2024_2027_: Manyan ayyukan sararin samaniya + al'amura 2024-2027. Muna rayuwa a lokuta masu ban sha'awa.
hausa.space_exploration_is_in_a_renaissance_: Binciken sararin samaniya yana cikin sabuntawa. Sabbin ƙasashe (Indiya, Japan, UAE), sabbin kamfanoni masu zaman kansu (SpaceX, Blue Origin), sabbin ayyuka (Europa Clipper, Artemis, JWST). Ka duba sama — ka kuma kula.
hausa.quick_reference_summary_of_solar_syste: Taƙaitaccen tunatarwa na abin da tsarin rana ya ƙunsa + rarraba nauyi.
hausa.the_sun_contains_99_86_of_all_solar_sy: Rana tana ɗauke da kashi 99.86% na dukkan nauyin tsarin rana. Jupiter yana ɗaukar kashi biyu bisa uku na sauran kashi 0.14%. Duniya + duk sauran abubuwa su ne saura.
hausa.from_our_own_luna_to_triton_enceladus_: Daga Luna namu zuwa Triton + Enceladus. Wasu sun fi Mercury girma.
hausa.most_spectacular_moons_in_the_solar_sy: Watanni mafi ban sha'awa a tsarin rana. Da yawa sun fi Pluto girma. Europa + Enceladus + Titan suna da tekuna ƙarƙashin ƙasa kuma su ne manyan manufofin ilimin rayuwar sararin samaniya.
hausa.why_utc_matters: 🌐 Me Ya Sa UTC Ke Da Muhimmanci
hausa.astronomers_report_everything_in_utc_t: Masana taurari suna bayar da rahoton komai a UTC. Bayanin yankunan lokaci.
hausa.why_we_use_utc: Me ya sa muke amfani da UTC
hausa.utc_coordinated_universal_time_is_the_: UTC (Lokacin Duniya da Aka Daidaita) shi ne tushen duniya. Ya dogara da agogon atom.
hausa.astronomers_report_events_in_utc_so_ob: Masana taurari suna bayar da rahoton al'amura a UTC don cibiyoyin lura a duniya su iya kwatantawa. SpaceX yana harbawa a UTC. Ayyukan NASA a UTC.
hausa.maine_utc_5_est_or_utc_4_edt_london_ut: Maine: UTC-5 (EST) ko UTC-4 (EDT). Landan: UTC+0 (GMT) ko UTC+1 (BST). Japan: UTC+9.
hausa.tip_when_you_read_an_astronomy_event_t: Shawara: idan ka karanta jadawalin al'amuran ilimin taurari, kullum ka duba ko na UTC ne ko na gida.
hausa.utc_replaced_gmt_in_1972_based_on_atom: UTC ya maye gurbin GMT a 1972. Ya dogara da agogon atom a dakunan bincike na ƙasa a duniya, an ɗauki matsakaici. Ana ƙara dakiku idan an buƙata.
hausa.40_interactive_tools_to_explore_in_thi: Kayan aiki 40+ masu mu'amala da za ka bincika a wannan app. Kowanne yana buɗe sabuwar taga kan wani abu na sararin samaniya.
hausa.15_cosmic_experiences_worth_chasing_mo: Abubuwan sararin samaniya 15 da suka cancanci bi. Yawancinsu kyauta ne + kusa.
hausa.15_cosmic_experiences_worth_chasing_mo_2: Abubuwan sararin samaniya 15 da suka cancanci bi. Yawancinsu ba sa kuɗi sai lokaci. Sararin dare ba ya neman komai daga gare ka — je ka gan shi.

hausa.12_facts_that_defy_what_you_think_you_: Gaskiya 12 da ke ƙalubalantar abin da kake tsammani ka sani game da duniyoyi.
hausa.12_things_that_surprise_people_about_o: Abubuwa 12 da ke ba mutane mamaki game da tsarin ranarmu. Kowanne yana ƙalubalantar hoton da hankali ke bayarwa.
hausa.pioneer_plaques_voyager_golden_records: Allunan Pioneer + Faifan Zinariya na Voyager + Saƙon Arecibo — alamun ɗan adam ga duk wanda zai iya sauraro.
hausa.gold_anodized_aluminum_on_pioneer_10_1: Aluminium mai shafin zinariya a Pioneer 10 + 11. Yana nuna mutane tsirara, wurin Duniya, hydrogen.
hausa.phonograph_record_on_voyager_1_2_115_p: Faifan phonograph a Voyager 1 + 2. Hotuna 115, waƙa (Beethoven zuwa Chuck Berry), gaisuwa cikin harsuna 55, sautunan Duniya.
hausa.radio_broadcast_to_globular_cluster_m1: Watsa rediyo zuwa rukunin taurari M13. Zai kai cikin shekaru ~25,000.
hausa.carl_sagan_frank_drake_linda_salzman_s: Carl Sagan + Frank Drake + Linda Salzman Sagan + wasu da yawa sun ƙera waɗannan. Kwamitin Faifan Voyager ya haɗa da Ann Druyan — wadda aka rubuta kalaman kwakwalwarta a matsayin ɓangare na faifan.
